---
title: "Announcing the ISV 2026 World Cup Competition"
author: "Håvard Strand"
date: "2026-06-04"
categories: [news]
---

Dear all good colleagues

Aaaahhh, finally! Days are brighter and the nights are endless. Smiles everywhere. The waiting period is over! The time has arrived! 
Some even claim it’s better than May 17 –better than Christmas - the climax of the year and the highlight of our lives – it’s the gentlemen’s World Cup in Football!
We would like everyone at Department of Political Science to enjoy the feast, and therefore, all of you are invited to attend the traditional ISV tipster competition for the World Cup 2026!

According to the Departments traditions, the competition is divided in both quantitative and qualitative forms. 
In addition, we encourage all participants to take part in participatory observations, preferably with social interaction as fieldwork method.
